summary: Comprehensive testing of /get-started 4-step wizard form and backend /api/public/leads endpoint. All UI steps, navigation, validation, and design elements verified. One CRITICAL integration bug found: form submission always fails with 422 'TCPA consent is required' because the backend requires consentTcpa=true but the frontend never sends this field.

critical.issue: Backend requires 'consentTcpa: true' (line 2465-2466 in server.py) but frontend GetStartedPage.jsx never includes 'consentTcpa' in the axios.post payload. Result: every form submission returns 422 'TCPA consent is required'. Success screen 'You're All Set!' is unreachable.

integration_issues.issue: Form submission fails with 'TCPA consent is required' error shown in UI — caused by missing consentTcpa field in axios.post payload (server.py line 2465 enforces it but GetStartedPage.jsx doesn't send it)

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: In GetStartedPage.jsx handleSubmit(), add 'consentTcpa: data.consentContact' to the axios.post payload (TCPA = Consent to Contact phone/text). This field is required by the backend but never sent by the frontend. Fix: add line 'consentTcpa: data.consentContact,' after 'consentInsurance: data.consentInsurance,' in the payload at line ~198
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: server.py line 2465 enforces `consent_tcpa is not True` → 422, but GetStartedPage.jsx has no consentTcpa field in state or payload. The frontend has 3 checkboxes (Contact, HIPAA, Insurance) but no TCPA checkbox. Fix: either (a) add consentTcpa: data.consentContact to payload since Consent to Contact IS TCPA consent, or (b) remove the TCPA check from backend since the form has an equivalent Consent to Contact checkbox.

Minor: Progress bar fill color is 'bg-gray-900' (dark/black) instead of blue (bg-[#0055CC]). The container background is blue-100 but fill is gray-900 — slightly inconsistent with the overall blue theme but not broken.

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed — 1 failed: test_valid_submission_without_tcpa confirms the bug)
success_rate.frontend: 93% (13/14 requirements verified — success screen unreachable due to TCPA bug)

seed_data_creation: None — form submission fails due to TCPA bug so no test leads created
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /get-started page (GetStartedPage.jsx) is a 4-step wizard. Steps 1-4 UI all work correctly. The only issue is form submission fails with 422 'TCPA consent is required'. Fix: add consentTcpa: data.consentContact to the axios.post payload in handleSubmit(). After the fix, verify the success screen 'You're All Set!' appears. URL prefill works (?pain=knee skips to step 2). Landing page CTAs navigate to /get-started. Product pages (ProductDetailPage.js, ProductCatalogPage.js) already point primaryHref to /get-started.
verified_features: ✅ /get-started page loads as full page (not modal), URL is /get-started
✅ Step 1: 'Where is your pain?' with 5 tiles (Back, Knee, Wrist, Shoulder, Other) in 3+2 grid
✅ Step 1: Selecting a tile highlights it with blue border and checkmark indicator
✅ Step 1: Clicking Next without selection shows error 'Please select an option to continue.'
✅ Step 2: 'What insurance do you have?' with 4 tiles (Medicare, Medicaid, Private, Other)
✅ Step 3: 'Do you have a doctor you've seen in the last year?' with Yes/No tiles
✅ Step 3: Clicking Next without selection shows error 'Please select an option to continue.'
✅ Step 4: Gradient blue-to-green header with 'Request Information' + product name 'Back Braces'
✅ Step 4: All form fields present (First Name, Last Name, Phone, Email, ZIP, Best Time, Notes)
✅ Step 4: Consent & Authorization section with 3 checkboxes and e-signature field
✅ Step 4: Submit without consents shows 'Please accept all required consents to continue.'
✅ Back button navigates to previous step
✅ Progress bar: 25% on step 1, 50% on step 2, 75% on step 3 — correct
✅ URL prefill ?pain=knee skips to Step 2 with Knee pre-selected
✅ Landing page 'Check Eligibility' CTA navigates to /get-started (goToGetStarted in landing.html)
❌ Full form submission fails with 422 'TCPA consent is required' — success screen unreachable

rca_of_issue.bug: Form submission 422 TCPA consent is required
rca_of_issue.root_cause: server.py line 2465: 'if lead_data.consent_tcpa is not True: raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail="TCPA consent is required")'. The field 'consent_tcpa' maps from JSON key 'consentTcpa' (via Field alias). GetStartedPage.jsx only sends consentContact, consentHipaa, consentInsurance but NOT consentTcpa.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Go to /get-started, 2. Select pain tile, 3. Select insurance, 4. Select doctor answer, 5. Fill all fields, check all 3 boxes, type signature, 6. Click 'Get Started' → API returns 422 'TCPA consent is required'
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add 'consentTcpa: data.consentContact,' to the axios.post payload in GetStartedPage.jsx handleSubmit() function. TCPA (Telephone Consumer Protection Act) consent maps 1:1 to the Consent to Contact checkbox in this form.
